name: SQL Injection Risk
description: Detects unsafe string concatenation in SQL queries.
message: Unsafe SQL query concatenation detected. Risk of SQL injection.
suggestion: Use PreparedStatement with placeholders (?) instead of string concatenation.

name: Weak Encryption
description: Detects use of weak algorithms like MD5 or DES.
suggestion: Use stronger algorithms like SHA-256 or AES.

name: Nested Loops Performance
description: Detects deeply nested loops (3 or more).
message: Deeply nested loops detected. Potential performance issue.
suggestion: Consider refactoring to reduce nesting or use more efficient data structures.
